Why Horla is a bad investment:
1) Ultrash - boring color boring mechanic boring playstyle
2) Visuals - ugly
4) Stats - Some of lowest base stats in game. Bottom 5 I think literally lowest limited
3) Unplayable at E0. Requires E1 to do anything
4) E2 clogs ur hand 
5) Emotions are tied to leap so u lose out on Quasar and Leaps, so bad in Ultra comps
6) ULT does almost nothing
She just sits there doing nothing besides killing ur team's stats and interfering with ur lines. This game slots in ur team are limited so u want ur awakers to provide an active role. The only teams that directly benefit from Horla are ones that lack ez access to weakness & vuln.

Like a quick example is someone like Horla.
Now Horla has 4 cards that can be all used, but people choose to use Joy. You can essentially switch her to a subDPS if necessary or other aspects.
Myriam's shtick is built more on her as a sub/main tier DPS, which reflects on her kit.
Most of my comps with her don't run Poison (and I'm not building heavily into Poison when other comps need damage atm with less setup), and I didn't get her WoD or dupes to run her as DPS.
In that sense, Myriam's definitely a more focused kind of Realm based support vs others that are splashable in other realms. Nothing wrong with her role, it's just her kit has very specific interactions that don't quite match my current vision of the comps I want to run.
